Deloitte | Revisjon, rådgivning, finans, risikostyring, skatt

Avvik: 95 | Bestått: 477
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (7 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="cmp-promo__content__title element__primary"> <span class="mt-1 dot-ellipsis dot-lines-2">Eventer </span> </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h3 to h5

<h5 class="cmp-title__text"> Følg oss </h5>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h4 instead of h5
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no main landmark

<body>
Add <main> element or role='main' to wrap primary content
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="cmp-header__subnav-tab"> <ul> <li> <a aria-haspopup="false" href="/no/no/about.html?icid=top_about"> Oversikt <
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="cmp-header__subnav-tab"> <ul> <li> <a aria-haspopup="false" href="/no/no/what-we-do.html?icid=top_what-we-do"> Oversikt
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="cmp-header__subnav-tab"> <ul> <li> <a aria-haspopup="false" href="/no/no/our-thinking/content-hub.html?icid=top_content-hub"> Oversikt
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="cmp-header__subnav-tab"> <ul> <li> <a aria-haspopup="false" href="/no/no/careers/life-at-deloitte.html?icid=top_life-at-deloitte"> Oversikt
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (12 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedinnhold'

<a aria-label="Gå til hovedinnhold" class="cmp-skip-navigation-link" href="#maincontent" role="button">Gå til hovedinnhold</a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="/no/no/Industries/industrial-construction/about.html?icid=top_about" rel="noopener" target="_blank"> Industrial Products & Construction
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="/no/no/Industries/technology/about.html?icid=top_about" rel="noopener" target="_blank"> Technology <i class="icon-external-link"></i> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Link text is not descriptive: 'Read more'

<a aria-describedby="Read more" class="inline-link" data-bs-target="#promo-modal-8e99193b" data-cq-id="4b51b4b4" data-promo-category="curated" data-promo-name="reMarkable: Enabling growth with S/4HANA
Use descriptive text that indicates where the link goes (e.g., 'Read more about products' instead of 'Read more')

SERIOUS

1.2.2 Teksting (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.2.2 (1.2.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Video has no captions track

<video autoplay="" class="vjs-fluid cmp-video__player video-js" data-setup='{"controls": false, "bigPlayButton": false, "controlBar": {"children": []}}' id="dynamicmedia_103319518" loop="" muted=""> <
Add <track kind='captions' src='captions.vtt' srclang='nb' label='Norsk'>
1.4.2 Styring av lyd (1 avvik)

SERIOUS

Video has no native controls

Automotive

https://www.deloitte.com/no/no/Industries/automotive/about.html?icid=top_about
Avvik: 62 | Bestått: 454
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (7 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="cmp-promo__content__title element__primary"> <span class="mt-1 dot-ellipsis dot-lines-2">Eventer </span> </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h3 to h5

<h5 class="cmp-title__text"> Følg oss </h5>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h4 instead of h5
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no main landmark

<body>
Add <main> element or role='main' to wrap primary content
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

<a aria-label="Gå til hovedinnhold" class="cmp-skip-navigation-link" href="#maincontent" role="button">Gå til hovedinnhold</a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)

Vår organisasjonsstruktur

https://www.deloitte.com/no/no/about/governance/network-brand-alliances.html?icid=top_network-brand-alliances
Avvik: 64 | Bestått: 439
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (8 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="cmp-promo__content__title element__primary"> <span class="mt-1 dot-ellipsis dot-lines-2">Eventer </span> </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3>Bli kjent med oss</h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h3 to h5

<h5 class="cmp-title__text"> Følg oss </h5>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h4 instead of h5
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no main landmark

<body>
Add <main> element or role='main' to wrap primary content
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

2.4.4 Formål med lenke (14 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedinnhold'

<a aria-label="Gå til hovedinnhold" class="cmp-skip-navigation-link" href="#maincontent" role="button">Gå til hovedinnhold</a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="/no/no/Industries/industrial-construction/about.html?icid=top_about" rel="noopener" target="_blank"> Industrial Products & Construction
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="/no/no/Industries/technology/about.html?icid=top_about" rel="noopener" target="_blank"> Technology <i class="icon-external-link"></i> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link uses javascript: URL

Use native <a> semantics or change to appropriate element

Power, Utilities & Renewables | Deloitte Global

https://www.deloitte.com/no/no/Industries/power-utilities-renewables/about.html?icid=top_about
Avvik: 62 | Bestått: 450
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (7 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="cmp-promo__content__title element__primary"> <span class="mt-1 dot-ellipsis dot-lines-2">Eventer </span> </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h3 to h5

<h5 class="cmp-title__text"> Følg oss </h5>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h4 instead of h5
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no main landmark

<body>
Add <main> element or role='main' to wrap primary content
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

2.4.4 Formål med lenke (9 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedinnhold'

<a aria-label="Gå til hovedinnhold" class="cmp-skip-navigation-link" href="#maincontent" role="button">Gå til hovedinnhold</a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden

MODERATE

<a> element has conflicting role='button'

Use native <a> semantics or change to appropriate element

https://www.deloitte.com/no/no/alliances/oracle.html?icid=top_oracle
Avvik: 155 | Bestått: 529

MODERATE

<a> element has conflicting role='button'

<a aria-label="Gå til hovedinnhold" class="cmp-skip-navigation-link" href="#maincontent" role="button">Gå til hovedinnhold</a>
Use native <a> semantics or change to appropriate element

Samfunnsansvar | Deloitte

https://www.deloitte.com/no/no/about/people/social-responsibility.html?icid=top_social-responsibility
Avvik: 64 | Bestått: 440
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (8 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="cmp-promo__content__title element__primary"> <span class="mt-1 dot-ellipsis dot-lines-2">Eventer </span> </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3 class="cmp-title__text"><span>Kontakt oss</span></h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h3 to h5

<h5 class="cmp-title__text"> Følg oss </h5>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h4 instead of h5
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no main landmark

<body>
Add <main> element or role='main' to wrap primary content
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="cmp-header__subnav-tab"> <ul> <li> <a aria-haspopup="false" href="/no/no/about.html?icid=top_about"> Oversikt <
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="cmp-header__subnav-tab"> <ul> <li> <a aria-haspopup="false" href="/no/no/what-we-do.html?icid=top_what-we-do"> Oversikt
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="cmp-header__subnav-tab"> <ul> <li> <a aria-haspopup="false" href="/no/no/our-thinking/content-hub.html?icid=top_content-hub"> Oversikt
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="cmp-header__subnav-tab"> <ul> <li> <a aria-haspopup="false" href="/no/no/careers/life-at-deloitte.html?icid=top_life-at-deloitte"> Oversikt
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (14 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedinnhold'

<a aria-label="Gå til hovedinnhold" class="cmp-skip-navigation-link" href="#maincontent" role="button">Gå til hovedinnhold</a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="/no/no/Industries/industrial-construction/about.html?icid=top_about" rel="noopener" target="_blank"> Industrial Products & Construction
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="/no/no/Industries/technology/about.html?icid=top_about" rel="noopener" target="_blank"> Technology <i class="icon-external-link"></i> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link uses javascript: URL

<a aria-label="Skriv ut" class="cmp-share-bar__print-link" data-provider="Print link" href="javascript:window.print();" tabindex="0" title="Skriv ut"> <i class="cmp-share-bar__links cmp-share-bar_icon
Use a button element for actions, or use href with progressive enhancement
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link with href='#' and onclick should be a button

<a aria-label="Del på email" class="cmp-share-bar__links icon-email" data-provider="email" data-share-channel="email" data-share-feature="share" data-share-type="page" href="#" onclick="launchShare('e
Use <button> element for interactive controls, or add role='button'
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link with href='#' and onclick should be a button

<a aria-label="Del på linkedin" class="cmp-share-bar__links icon-linkedin" data-provider="linkedin" data-share-channel="linkedin" data-share-feature="share" data-share-type="page" href="#" onclick="la
Use <button> element for interactive controls, or add role='button'

<a> element has conflicting role='button'

Kontakt oss

https://www.deloitte.com/no/no/contact/contact-us.html?icid=bn_contact-us
Avvik: 60 | Bestått: 441
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (8 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="cmp-promo__content__title element__primary"> <span class="mt-1 dot-ellipsis dot-lines-2">Eventer </span> </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3 class="cmp-title__text"><span>Send inn skjema</span></h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h3 to h5

<h5 class="cmp-title__text"> Følg oss </h5>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h4 instead of h5
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no main landmark

<body>
Add <main> element or role='main' to wrap primary content
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="cmp-header__subnav-tab"> <ul> <li> <a aria-haspopup="false" href="/no/no/about.html?icid=top_about"> Oversikt <
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

2.4.4 Formål med lenke (8 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedinnhold'

<a aria-label="Gå til hovedinnhold" class="cmp-skip-navigation-link" href="#maincontent" role="button">Gå til hovedinnhold</a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="/no/no/Industries/industrial-construction/about.html?icid=top_about" rel="noopener" target="_blank"> Industrial Products & Construction
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="/no/no/Industries/technology/about.html?icid=top_about" rel="noopener" target="_blank"> Technology <i class="icon-external-link"></i> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

Terms of use

https://www.deloitte.com/no/no/legal/legal.html?icid=bn_legal
Avvik: 60 | Bestått: 433
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (8 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="cmp-promo__content__title element__primary"> <span class="mt-1 dot-ellipsis dot-lines-2">Eventer </span> </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h5

<h5><b>About Deloitte.com</b></h5>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h5
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h3 to h5

<h5 class="cmp-title__text"> Følg oss </h5>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h4 instead of h5
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no main landmark

<body>
Add <main> element or role='main' to wrap primary content

MODERATE

Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedinnhold'

<a aria-label="Gå til hovedinnhold" class="cmp-skip-navigation-link" href="#maincontent" role="button">Gå til hovedinnhold</a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

MODERATE

<a> element has conflicting role='button'

<a aria-label="Gå til hovedinnhold" class="cmp-skip-navigation-link" href="#maincontent" role="button">Gå til hovedinnhold</a>
Use native <a> semantics or change to appropriate element
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

<a> element has conflicting role='button'

<a aria-label="View the privacy statement" data-btn-linktype="nolinktypedefined" href="/no/no/legal/privacy.html.html" role="button" target="_self"> View the privacy sta
Use native <a> semantics or change to appropriate element

Our services | Deloitte Global

https://www.deloitte.com/no/no/services.html?icid=top_services
Avvik: 59 | Bestått: 464
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (7 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="cmp-promo__content__title element__primary"> <span class="mt-1 dot-ellipsis dot-lines-2">Eventer </span> </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h3 to h5

<h5 class="cmp-title__text"> Følg oss </h5>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h4 instead of h5
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no main landmark

<body>
Add <main> element or role='main' to wrap primary content
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="cmp-header__subnav-tab"> <ul> <li> <a aria-haspopup="false" href="/no/no/about.html?icid=top_about"> Oversikt <
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="cmp-header__subnav-tab"> <ul> <li> <a aria-haspopup="false" href="/no/no/what-we-do.html?icid=top_what-we-do"> Oversikt
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="cmp-header__subnav-tab"> <ul> <li> <a aria-haspopup="false" href="/no/no/our-thinking/content-hub.html?icid=top_content-hub"> Oversikt

Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="cmp-header__subnav-tab"> <ul> <li> <a aria-haspopup="false" href="/no/no/careers/life-at-deloitte.html?icid=top_life-at-deloitte"> Oversikt
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (8 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedinnhold'

<a aria-label="Gå til hovedinnhold" class="cmp-skip-navigation-link" href="#maincontent" role="button">Gå til hovedinnhold</a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="/no/no/Industries/industrial-construction/about.html?icid=top_about" rel="noopener" target="_blank"> Industrial Products & Construction
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="/no/no/Industries/technology/about.html?icid=top_about" rel="noopener" target="_blank"> Technology <i class="icon-external-link"></i> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a aria-label="facebook" class="cmp-linklist__item-link" href="https://www.facebook.com/DeloitteNorge" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank" title="facebook"> <i class="icon-facebook"></i> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a aria-label="linkedin" class="cmp-linklist__item-link" href="https://www.linkedin.com/company/deloitte/" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank" title="linkedin"> <i class="icon-linkedin"></i> </a
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a aria-label="youtube" class="cmp-linklist__item-link" href="https://www.youtube.com/user/DeloitteNorge" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank" title="youtube"> <i class="icon-youtube"></i> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a aria-label="instagram" class="cmp-linklist__item-link" href="https://www.instagram.com/deloittenorge/" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank" title="instagram"> <i class="icon-instagram"></i> </
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link text is a URL

Replace URL with descriptive text that explains the link destination

Emerging ERP Solutions | Deloitte

https://www.deloitte.com/no/no/services/consulting/services/emerging-erp-solutions.html?icid=top_emerging-erp-solutions
Avvik: 73 | Bestått: 468
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (8 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="cmp-promo__content__title element__primary"> <span class="mt-1 dot-ellipsis dot-lines-2">Eventer </span> </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h3 to h5

<h5 class="cmp-title__text font-weight__semi-bold"> Deloitte recognised by Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ and Critical Capabilities for Clou
Don't skip heading levels. Use h4 instead of h5
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h3 to h5

<h5 class="cmp-title__text"> Følg oss </h5>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h4 instead of h5

2.4.4 Formål med lenke (11 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedinnhold'

<a aria-label="Gå til hovedinnhold" class="cmp-skip-navigation-link" href="#maincontent" role="button">Gå til hovedinnhold</a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="/no/no/Industries/industrial-construction/about.html?icid=top_about" rel="noopener" target="_blank"> Industrial Products & Construction
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="/no/no/Industries/technology/about.html?icid=top_about" rel="noopener" target="_blank"> Technology <i class="icon-external-link"></i> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a href="#"> </a>
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text

Privacy

https://www.deloitte.com/no/no/legal/privacy.html?icid=bn_privacy
Avvik: 74 | Bestått: 463
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (9 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="cmp-promo__content__title element__primary"> <span class="mt-1 dot-ellipsis dot-lines-2">Eventer </span> </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h5

<h5 class="cmp-title__text"> 1. What is the purpose of this information? </h5>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h5
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h3 to h5

<h5 class="cmp-title__text"> Følg oss </h5>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h4 instead of h5
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no main landmark

<body>
Add <main> element or role='main' to wrap primary content
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

2.4.4 Formål med lenke (8 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedinnhold'

<a aria-label="Gå til hovedinnhold" class="cmp-skip-navigation-link" href="#maincontent" role="button">Gå til hovedinnhold</a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="/no/no/Industries/industrial-construction/about.html?icid=top_about" rel="noopener" target="_blank"> Industrial Products & Construction
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="/no/no/Industries/technology/about.html?icid=top_about" rel="noopener" target="_blank"> Technology <i class="icon-external-link"></i> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a aria-label="facebook" class="cmp-linklist__item-link" href="https://www.facebook.com/DeloitteNorge" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank" title="facebook"> <i class="icon-facebook"></i> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

Link text is a URL

MODERATE

Use native <a> semantics or change to appropriate element

Bertel O. Steen | Deloitte Norge

https://www.deloitte.com/no/no/Industries/automotive/case-studies/bertel-o-steen.html
Avvik: 67 | Bestått: 465
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (7 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="cmp-promo__content__title element__primary"> <span class="mt-1 dot-ellipsis dot-lines-2">Eventer </span> </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h3 to h5

<h5 class="cmp-title__text"> Følg oss </h5>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h4 instead of h5
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no main landmark

<body>
Add <main> element or role='main' to wrap primary content
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="cmp-header__subnav-tab"> <ul> <li> <a aria-haspopup="false" href="/no/no/about.html?icid=top_about"> Oversikt <
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="cmp-header__subnav-tab"> <ul> <li> <a aria-haspopup="false" href="/no/no/what-we-do.html?icid=top_what-we-do"> Oversikt
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="cmp-header__subnav-tab"> <ul> <li> <a aria-haspopup="false" href="/no/no/our-thinking/content-hub.html?icid=top_content-hub"> Oversikt
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="cmp-header__subnav-tab"> <ul> <li> <a aria-haspopup="false" href="/no/no/careers/life-at-deloitte.html?icid=top_life-at-deloitte"> Oversikt
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (18 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedinnhold'

<a aria-label="Gå til hovedinnhold" class="cmp-skip-navigation-link" href="#maincontent" role="button">Gå til hovedinnhold</a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="/no/no/Industries/industrial-construction/about.html?icid=top_about" rel="noopener" target="_blank"> Industrial Products & Construction
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="/no/no/Industries/technology/about.html?icid=top_about" rel="noopener" target="_blank"> Technology <i class="icon-external-link"></i> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link uses javascript: URL

<a aria-label="Skriv ut" class="cmp-share-bar__print-link" data-provider="Print link" href="javascript:window.print();" tabindex="0" title="Skriv ut"> <i class="cmp-share-bar__links cmp-share-bar_icon
Use a button element for actions, or use href with progressive enhancement
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link with href='#' and onclick should be a button

<a aria-label="Del på email" class="cmp-share-bar__links icon-email" data-provider="email" data-share-channel="email" data-share-feature="share" data-share-type="page" href="#" onclick="launchShare('e
Use <button> element for interactive controls, or add role='button'
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link with href='#' and onclick should be a button

<a aria-label="Del på linkedin" class="cmp-share-bar__links icon-linkedin" data-provider="linkedin" data-share-channel="linkedin" data-share-feature="share" data-share-type="page" href="#" onclick="la
Use <button> element for interactive controls, or add role='button'
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a href="#"> </a>
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a href="#"> </a>
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a href="#"> </a>
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text

MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

MODERATE

Link uses javascript: URL

<a aria-label="Ja" href="javascript:void(0);" target="_self">Ja</a>

MODERATE

Link uses javascript: URL

SERIOUS

Link text is not descriptive: 'Les mer'

<a href="/no/no/our-thinking.html">Les mer</a>

<a> element has conflicting role='button'

Use native <a> semantics or change to appropriate element

Alliances | Deloitte

https://www.deloitte.com/no/no/alliances.html?icid=top_alliances
Avvik: 67 | Bestått: 429
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (7 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="cmp-promo__content__title element__primary"> <span class="mt-1 dot-ellipsis dot-lines-2">Eventer </span> </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h3 to h5

<h5 class="cmp-title__text"> Følg oss </h5>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h4 instead of h5
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no main landmark

<body>
Add <main> element or role='main' to wrap primary content
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

2.4.4 Formål med lenke (13 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedinnhold'

<a aria-label="Gå til hovedinnhold" class="cmp-skip-navigation-link" href="#maincontent" role="button">Gå til hovedinnhold</a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="/no/no/Industries/industrial-construction/about.html?icid=top_about" rel="noopener" target="_blank"> Industrial Products & Construction
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="/no/no/Industries/technology/about.html?icid=top_about" rel="noopener" target="_blank"> Technology <i class="icon-external-link"></i> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden

Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden

SERIOUS

Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

<a> element has conflicting role='button'

Use native <a> semantics or change to appropriate element

Sales & Service | Deloitte

https://www.deloitte.com/no/no/services/consulting/services/digital-customer.html?icid=top_digital-customer
Avvik: 99 | Bestått: 486
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (7 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="cmp-promo__content__title element__primary"> <span class="mt-1 dot-ellipsis dot-lines-2">Eventer </span> </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h3 to h5

<h5 class="cmp-title__text"> Følg oss </h5>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h4 instead of h5
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no main landmark

<body>
Add <main> element or role='main' to wrap primary content

MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

2.4.4 Formål med lenke (14 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedinnhold'

<a aria-label="Gå til hovedinnhold" class="cmp-skip-navigation-link" href="#maincontent" role="button">Gå til hovedinnhold</a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="/no/no/Industries/industrial-construction/about.html?icid=top_about" rel="noopener" target="_blank"> Industrial Products & Construction
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="/no/no/Industries/technology/about.html?icid=top_about" rel="noopener" target="_blank"> Technology <i class="icon-external-link"></i> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a href="#"> </a>
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text

MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

World Impact | Deloitte Global

https://www.deloitte.com/no/no/about/story/impact.html?icid=top_impact
Avvik: 107 | Bestått: 458
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

Add descriptive alt text to the image
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (7 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="cmp-promo__content__title element__primary"> <span class="mt-1 dot-ellipsis dot-lines-2">Eventer </span> </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h3 to h5

<h5 class="cmp-title__text"> Følg oss </h5>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h4 instead of h5

MODERATE

Page has no main landmark

<body>
Add <main> element or role='main' to wrap primary content

Add aria-selected attribute to element with role='tab'
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)

<a> element has conflicting role='button'

Use native <a> semantics or change to appropriate element
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Element has empty aria-label

<a aria-label="" class="cmp-image-v3__link" href="https://www2.deloitte.com/content/dam/html/shared/COP26-interactive-components/assets/article-images-600x600/1255859412_getty_stim.jpg" target="_self"
Provide descriptive text in aria-label or remove if not needed

Transfer Pricing | Deloitte

https://www.deloitte.com/no/no/services/tax/services/transfer-pricing.html?icid=top_transfer-pricing
Avvik: 66 | Bestått: 453
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (7 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="cmp-promo__content__title element__primary"> <span class="mt-1 dot-ellipsis dot-lines-2">Eventer </span> </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1

<h3 class="font-size__x-large font-weight__light" id="cmp-modal-title"></h3>
Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed

Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link

Om oss | Deloitte

https://www.deloitte.com/no/no/about.html?icid=bn_about
Avvik: 88 | Bestått: 486
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (8 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="cmp-promo__content__title element__primary"> <span class="mt-1 dot-ellipsis dot-lines-2">Eventer </span> </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4 class="cmp-profile-promo__name"> <a aria-label="Cecilia Flatum" class="cmp-profile-promo-href" href="/no/no/about/people/profiles.cflatum%2B16c3604c.html">Cecilia Flatum</a> </h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h3 to h5

<h5 class="cmp-title__text"> Følg oss </h5>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h4 instead of h5
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no main landmark

<body>
Add <main> element or role='main' to wrap primary content
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="cmp-header__subnav-tab"> <ul> <li> <a aria-haspopup="false" href="/no/no/about.html?icid=top_about"> Oversikt <
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

M&A Tax | Deloitte
